inputs.fcf_source: Mid-cycle owner cash: FY2024 OCF €21.1M minus capex €5.8M = €0.26/sh, adjusted upward for structural reforms but below FY2025 spike OCF €53.6M (€0.87/sh)
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 peak activity (+58.9% turnover); base owner cash below spot FY2025 cash from operations minus capital spending

bear.notes: Greek volume mean-reversion; Euronext integration costs linger

base.notes: Mid-cycle owner cash; FTSE developed-market upgrade Sept 2026 embedded in growth [Assumption]

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Real estate investments revalued at fair value; Acharnon property income approach in annual report note 5.24

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Exchange franchise; Thessaloniki property sold Nov 2025

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Group EBIT €37.7M FY2025; all operating segments profitable

option_scan.question: Backlog not in cash path?
option_scan.evidence: Fees follow trading and listing activity

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: IT/digital and data services in turnover mix; Euronext integration synergy

option_scan.question: Material separate option terminals?
option_scan.evidence: Lawrence full cash-flow path sufficient; real estate marks in comprehensive income not separate terminal

growth_explanation.mechanism: Greek capital market reforms, FTSE Russell developed-market reclassification effective Sept 2026, and Euronext integration expand handled volume and listing fees; base growth assumes partial normalization from FY2025 peak.
falsifiers: Consolidated turnover falls below €60M for two consecutive years
Post-trading segment EBIT margin compresses below 40%
